43_sort_sort_an_array_of_structs_by_key.code:
// Using sort_by (stable) to act as the reference implementation
    results.sort_by(|a, b| a.start_time.cmp(&b.start_time));

26_reduce_product_of_inverses.code:
x.iter()
        .enumerate()
        .map(|(i, &val)| if i % 2 != 0 { 1.0 / val } else { val })
        .product()

28_reduce_smallest_odd_number.code:
x.iter()
        .filter(|&&v| v % 2 != 0) // Check if number is odd
        .cloned()
        .min()
        .unwrap_or(i32::MAX) // Default to MAX if no odd numbers found
